info.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and the admin JWT token.
info.title: Cosmoria API

post.description: Authenticate as a platform admin and receive a JWT.

get.description: List all projects accessible by the authenticated admin.

post.description: Create a new project as a platform admin.

get.description: List all admin roles assigned to a project. super_admin only.
get.summary: List admin roles for a project

post.description: Assign an admin user to a project with a specific role. super_admin only.
post.summary: Assign admin role to a project

delete.description: Remove an admin user's access to a project. super_admin only.
delete.summary: Remove admin role from a project

get.description: List all collections for a project.

post.description: Create a new dynamic collection with a schema.

get.description: Get a collection definition by ID.

put.description: Update the schema of an existing collection.

delete.description: Delete a collection and all its records.

get.description: List all RBAC roles for a project. super_admin only.

post.description: Create a new RBAC role for a project. super_admin only.

delete.description: Delete a role and its permissions. super_admin only.

get.description: List all permissions assigned to a role. super_admin only.

post.description: Add a (resource, action) permission to a role. super_admin only.
post.summary: Set a permission on a role

delete.description: Remove a (resource, action) permission from a role. super_admin only.
delete.summary: Remove a permission from a role

get.description: Get the RBAC role assigned to a SaaS user for a project. super_admin only.

post.description: Assign an RBAC role to a SaaS user for a project. super_admin only.
post.summary: Assign a role to a user

delete.description: Remove the RBAC role assignment from a SaaS user. super_admin only.

post.description: Create the first super_admin and default project. Only works once.
Authenticate and receive a JWT token for API access.
Create a new end-user account scoped to a project.

get.description: List all tenants within a project.

post.description: Create a new tenant within a project.

delete.description: Delete a tenant and its data.

get.description: List records in a collection with cursor-based pagination.

post.description: Create a new record in a collection. Data is validated against the collection schema.

get.description: Get a single record by ID.

put.description: Replace a record's data (full JSONB replacement). Validated against the schema.

post.description: Assign an existing user to a tenant.

delete.description: Remove a user's access to a tenant.

get.description: Returns the health status of the server.
